{# corporate-formal.html — Professional blue-gray business presentation #} {% extends "base_reveal.html" %} {% set style = { "reveal_theme": "white", "font_heading": "'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif", "font_body": "'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif", "heading_color": "#1a365d", "text_color": "#2d3748", "accent_color": "#3182ce", "link_hover": "#2b6cb0", "table_header_bg": "#1a365d", "table_stripe_bg": "rgba(49,130,206,0.06)", "blockquote_bg": "rgba(49,130,206,0.05)", "code_bg": "#f7fafc" } %} {% set transition = "slide" %} {% block extra_css %} .reveal section[data-state="title-slide"] h1 { font-size: 2.4em; border-bottom: 4px solid {{ style.accent_color }}; padding-bottom: 0.3em; display: inline-block; } .reveal section[data-state="closing-slide"] { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a365d, #3182ce); } .reveal section[data-state="closing-slide"] h2, .reveal section[data-state="closing-slide"] p { color: #ffffff; } {% endblock %}
